metaTitle: Age Calculator — Calculate Exact Age in Years, Months & Days
metaDescription: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days instantly. Find out days until your next birthday too. 100% free and works offline.

howto.description: Select your birth date using the date picker.
Your age in years, months, and days is calculated instantly.
See how many days are left until your next birthday.

why: Calculates exact age in years, months, and days
Shows days until your next birthday
Shows total days, weeks, and months lived
Works completely offline — no internet needed
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.q: How is my exact age calculated?
faq.a: Your age is calculated by comparing your date of birth to today's date, accounting for leap years and varying month lengths.

faq.q: Does this work for any date of birth?
faq.a: Yes. You can enter any date of birth from the past to calculate an exact age.

faq.q: How are days until next birthday calculated?
faq.a: The tool finds your next upcoming birthday and counts the exact number of days remaining from today.

faq.q: Is my date of birth stored anywhere?
faq.a: No. Everything runs entirely in your browser. Your data is never sent to any server.

faq.q: Can I calculate someone else's age?
faq.a: Yes. Simply enter their date of birth to calculate their exact age.

proTips: Use this tool to quickly verify age requirements for forms, applications, or events.
Check how many days until a friend's birthday to plan ahead for a surprise.
Calculate the age difference between two people by running the tool twice.
troubleshooting: If the date picker doesn't open, try typing the date directly in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Make sure the birth date is not set to a future date.
